pestle_analysis.description: Political, Economic, Social, Technological, Legal, Environmental influence

riskIdentification.description: List potential risks and disruptions that could affect your organisation. Include natural disasters, technological failures and supply chain disruptions.

Industry Analysis Checklist.purpose: Checklist to help define your position in your industry and identify possible niche markets for your product.

new_competitors.question1: Are there any new competitors in the arena?
new_competitors.is_hot_idea: Does everyone think this is a hot idea?

recent_failures.question: Have any competitors gone out of business recently?

market_entry_barriers.no_new_entries_reason: If there have been no new entries in the market, is it due to fatal flaws, first-mover advantage, or unresolved problems?

market_density.competitor_market_ratio: Are there a small number of competitors for a large market, or a large number for a small market?

large_vs_small_players.niche_opportunity: Can you fill a small but profitable niche?
large_vs_small_players.capital_strength: Do you have the capital to compete head-to-head?
large_vs_small_players.risk_of_attack: Are you at risk of being attacked by large established corporations?

recent_innovation.question2: Has there been recent innovation in the market?
recent_innovation.profit_margin_issue: Are low profit margins discouraging innovation?
recent_innovation.corporate_complacency: Are large corporations becoming complacent, creating opportunity?

service_quality_gap.question3: Is there room for improvement in service quality?
service_quality_gap.competitive_edge: Can improved service provide an advantage?

market_type.new_market: Is this a new and rapidly growing market?
market_type.old_market: Is this a mature or old market?

entry_strategy.new_market_strategy: In a new market, speed and adaptability are critical.
entry_strategy.old_market_strategy: In an old market, innovation and differentiation are necessary.

sections.description1: Introduce the consulting company and explain the client's IT challenges and areas that need improvement.

sections.description2: Describe the services provided as part of the IT consultancy.

sections.description4: List the results the consulting company will deliver.

subsections1.mission_statement: Defining the problem solved for users.
subsections1.product_history: The 'Why' behind the product and founder story.

subsections2.confidentiality_and_ip: Ownership of code, data, and intellectual property.

subsections.code_of_conduct: Professionalism standards for Slack, Zoom, and in-person.
subsections.equipment_use: Acceptable use policy for laptops and software licenses.

subsections.parental_leave: Maternity, paternity, and adoption leave details.
subsections.sabbatical_policy: Extended leave eligibility after X years.

subsections6.promotion_framework: Defined levels (e.g., Junior to Staff Engineer).

subsections7.termination: Dismissal grounds and Performance Improvement Plans (PIPs).
subsections7.property_return: Checklist for hardware and security badges.

critical_strengths.prompt1: What are the top 2-3 things this manager does exceptionally well?

areas_for_improvement.prompt2: What is one specific thing this manager could do differently to better support you or the team?

barrier_analysis.prompt3: Is there anything currently within the manager's control that is preventing the team from reaching its full potential?

accomplishments.description: Key milestone, project, or KPI met.

key_entities.affiliate: Entities with 50% or more ownership control.

asset_definitions.content: Text, images, or data posted by users.

content_governance.user_license_grant: License granted to company to host/display content.
content_governance.company_authority: Right to moderate, edit, or remove content.
content_governance.backup_disclaimer: Company is not liable for lost user data.

liability_and_disclaimers.limitation_of_liability: Capped at amount paid or 100 USD.
liability_and_disclaimers.as_is_disclaimer: Service provided without warranty of uptime or accuracy.
liability_and_disclaimers.third_party_links: No responsibility for external site practices.

legal_provisions.termination_conditions: Right to suspend for breach of terms.

general_provisions.purpose_statement: Explains what cookies are and how the Company uses them.
general_provisions.privacy_policy_relationship: Links personal data stored in cookies to the main Privacy Policy.
general_provisions.sensitive_data_exclusion: Explicit statement that passwords or addresses are NOT stored in cookies.

definitions.cookies: Small files placed on your device to track browsing history.

functional_categories.acceptance_cookies: Identify if user has agreed to the cookie banner.
functional_categories.functionality_cookies: Remember choices like login details or language.
functional_categories.tracking_performance_cookies: Third-party cookies used for traffic analysis.

user_consent_and_control.opt_out_procedures: Instructions for disabling cookies via browser settings.
user_consent_and_control.disable_consequences: Notice that some features may break if cookies are refused.

key_definitions.agreement: The full contract between User and Company.
key_definitions.application_store: Apple App Store or Google Play Store.
key_definitions.device: Hardware used to run the app.

license_grant_and_scope.usage_scope: Personal, non-commercial use on controlled devices.
license_grant_and_scope.store_rules_compliance: Adherence to App Store/Play Store terms.

prohibited_actions: Selling, renting, or distributing the software
Reverse engineering or creating derivative works

intellectual_property.ownership: Company retains all rights to original features and code.
intellectual_property.feedback_policy: User suggestions are assigned/licensed to the Company.

maintenance_and_support.service_level: No obligation for support unless required by law.

disclaimers_and_liability.as_is_basis: No warranty for compatibility or error-free operation.
disclaimers_and_liability.limitation_of_liability: Capped at amount paid or 100 USD.
disclaimers_and_liability.indemnification: User holds company harmless from claims arising from breach.

term_and_termination.effective_period: Active until terminated by either party.
term_and_termination.termination_rights: Immediate suspension for breach of terms.
term_and_termination.effect_of_termination: Cease all use and delete all copies of the app.

legal_and_compliance.us_compliance: Not on a prohibited/restricted party list.
legal_and_compliance.severability_and_waiver: Invalid provisions do not affect the whole.

metadata.purpose: Describes policies on collection, use, and disclosure of user information.

key_definitions.account: Unique access profile for the Service.
key_definitions.personal_data: Information relating to an identified or identifiable individual.
key_definitions.service_provider: Third-parties processing data on behalf of the Company.
key_definitions.usage_data: Data collected automatically (IP, browser type, etc.).

types_of_data.tracking_technologies: Cookies and Web Beacons usage details.

data_sharing_and_disclosure.business_transfers: Data transfer during mergers or asset sales.
data_sharing_and_disclosure.legal_disclosure: Response to public authorities or legal requirements.

retention_and_transfer.retention_policy: Data kept only as long as necessary for defined purposes.
retention_and_transfer.data_transfer: Processing locations and cross-border transfer notices.

rights_and_security.childrens_privacy: Policy for users under 13 (or local age of consent).

external_factors.third_party_links: Non-responsibility for external site privacy practices.

strategic_overview.marketing_smart_goal: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, and Time-bound goal.

overview.purpose: The objective and intended outcome of this procedure.
overview.scope: The specific team, process, or software this SOP applies to.

resources: Links to software, templates, or physical equipment needed.

Marketing Report.executive_summary: High-level narrative of the reporting period's success and challenges.

metadata.scope: e.g., Product Launch, Annual Strategy, Competitor Comparison

strengths.description1: Positive internal attributes that provide an advantage.

weaknesses.description2: Internal factors that place the entity at a disadvantage.

opportunities.factor3: e.g., Emerging market in SE Asia

threats.description4: External elements that could cause trouble.

content_and_creative_audit.ad_communication: What the ads actually communicated to the audience.

creative_strategy.key_message: The one thing the audience should remember.
creative_strategy.tone_and_voice: e.g., Professional yet witty, Authoritative, or High-energy.

sections.question1: Have you analysed the market and identified appealing features for different segments?

sections.question2: Have you described how your product/service benefits your clients?

sections.question3: Have you prepared a pricing schedule and discount policy?

sections.question4: Have you prepared a sales forecast?

sections.question5: What media, promotions, and publicity campaigns are planned?

sections.question6: Have you addressed patenting and distribution channels?

risk_and_communication.communication_plan: Protocol for internal and external stakeholders.

market_positioning.unique_selling_proposition: The core reason why this project is better than alternatives.
market_positioning.competitive_analysis: Summary of market rivals and our edge.

core_philosophy.statement_of_intent: A high-level declaration of the organization's values.
core_philosophy.purpose: The specific reason this policy exists (e.g., Carbon Neutrality by 2030).

strategies_and_actions.action_step: Install smart thermostats in all office locations.

accountability.monitoring_procedures: How progress is measured (e.g., monthly utility audits).

audit_findings.audit_question: Is multi-factor authentication enabled for all administrative accounts?

qualitative_data.recommendations: Implement hardware security keys for high-risk users.

resolution.resulting_action: e.g., Verbal warning, Suspension, Training required.

incident_discovery.method_of_detection: e.g., IDS Alert, User Report, Manual Audit
incident_discovery.narrative_description: When, where, and how it occurred.

response_log.containment_measures: Immediate actions taken to isolate the threat.

event_details.description_narrative: A detailed account of the event.

resolution.follow_up_action: e.g., Police notified, Security footage archived.

revision_history.change_description: Initial creation of standardized sales flow.

policy_framework.purpose: To standardize the sales process and ensure seamless customer transitions.
policy_framework.scope: Applies to all B2B and Enterprise sales activities.

procedure_stages.sales_call_discovery: Standardized discovery questions and pain point mapping.
procedure_stages.proposal_quoting: Pricing approval workflow and contract generation.
procedure_stages.post_sale_handoff: Transfer of account data to Customer Success (CS).

governance.documentation_requirements: All calls must be logged in CRM with notes.

key_benefits: [LIST KEY BENEFITS OF USING YOUR SOLUTION]

metadata.confidentiality_statement: This document contains proprietary information provided in reliance upon the recipient's consent not to disclose.

executive_overview.current_position: Summary of company issues, goals, and key strategies.
executive_overview.target_attainment: Analysis of whether goals were met and how.

revenue_analysis.formula: Units Sold x Average Selling Price.

profitability.gross_profit: Revenue minus cost of goods sold (COGS).

growth_and_strategy.valuation_impact: How revenue growth reflects market share and influences company valuation.

recitals.property_details: Comprehensive description of the property/assets being sold.
recitals.original_agreement_reference: Date or ID of the initial contract.

special_provisions: Any specific conditions or contingencies added to the sale.
